Sponsorships / Eklipse

Eklipse

software
Affiliate
5%-10% Commission
affiliate
Apply Now → Visit Website

Overview

Eklipse is an AI tool for streamers that automatically generates highlights from your Twitch, YouTube, Kick and Facebook streams.

It captures a wide range of content that can be easily transformed into TikTok / Reels / YouTube Shorts. Eklipse utilizes AI to assist you in capturing more content for sharing on your favorite social media platforms, allowing you to focus on streaming.

Eklipse Affiliate Program

The Eklipse Affiliate Program allows individuals to earn a commission by referring customers to Eklipse’s premium services. Once you sign up and your application is accepted, you will receive a generated code which can be shared with your network. You will earn a commission on each premium referral code used

Program benefits:

  • Free upgrade to a premium account and can offer discounts to your community when your unique referral code is used.
  • Share a 5% discount on monthly premium plan purchases and a 10% discount on annual premium plan purchases.
  • Earn a 5% commission for each monthly premium plan purchase and a 10% commission for each annual premium plan purchase. ‍
